title: Trump ends ceasefire with Iran, attacks occur and global markets fall sharply
summary: Oil surges more than 6%, gold and silver fall, and Wall Street, European and Asian stock markets register significant losses after the end of the truce and US bombings against Iran.

title: SpaceX enters the Nasdaq-100 and receives buy recommendations with potential up to 70%
summary: Elon Musk's company accelerates its stock market presence with positive analyses from Deutsche Bank and other banks, while expanding its business with ispace for lunar missions.

title: AI semiconductor stocks plunge on fears of a bubble and drag down Asian markets
summary: South Korea enters bear market, Samsung falls despite soaring profits, and memory manufacturers suffer widespread losses.

title: Artificial intelligence revolutionizes the financial sector amid regulatory alerts and profitability gains
summary: Regulators warn about AI cyberattacks, the CNMV updates its governance code, and AI generates half of the profitability of the European stock market.

title: Apple and Broadcom expand their $30 billion partnership to manufacture chips in the US
summary: The multi-year agreement strengthens domestic semiconductor production and secures key components for Apple's devices.

title: Trump threatens to cut all trade with Spain and the Ibex 35 plunges more than 2%
summary: The statements by the former US president against the Spanish government worsen the fall of the Spanish stock market, especially in the stocks most exposed to the US.

title: Ford plunges 20% in June, Honda recalls 300,000 vehicles and GM receives an upgrade from JP Morgan
summary: The US auto sector experiences a mixed day with poor sales data and quality issues, while General Motors receives a boost from analysts.

title: The energy sector sees mixed moves: oil rising, nuclear stocks falling, and rating upgrades
summary: Occidental and ConocoPhillips receive positive ratings, while nuclear stocks plunge and oil rises due to geopolitical tensions.

title: UniCredit increases its stake in Commerzbank to over 44% and brings the takeover bid closer
summary: The Italian entity reinforces its position in the German bank amid the battle for European banking integration.

title: Cathie Wood takes advantage of the market collapse to buy shares of three companies
summary: ARK Investment's manager acquires shares of technology companies at reduced prices during the stock market correction.

title: Royal Caribbean chosen as top pick by BMO Capital due to strong cruise momentum
summary: The cruise company benefits from strong demand and favorable sector outlook.

title: UBS recommends buying SK Hynix ADRs in the US to take advantage of the chipmaker's potential
summary: The Swiss bank initiates coverage with a buy recommendation, highlighting the memory market outlook.

title: Spanish banking restructures: Bankinter completes an integration, Unicaja launches factoring, and Sabadell and BBVA grab attention
summary: Spanish entities advance in their business plans while analysts adjust their valuations of the sector.

title: Exchange Kraken applies for banking license in Europe, bitcoin exceeds $60,000 and Spain authorizes stablecoin payments
summary: The crypto ecosystem records regulatory and market advances amid global volatility.

title: Analysts examine the tax efficiency of dividends and recommend two high-yield stocks
summary: Several reports break down the tax advantages of dividends from companies like JPMorgan and Caterpillar, and select two stocks with high dividend yields.

title: Securitize, the first Spanish unicorn on Wall Street, suffers extreme volatility in its stock market debut
summary: The asset tokenization company rises 11% on its debut but subsequently plunges 30% from its offering price.

title: Alibaba surges nearly 10% on its results and leads the rally of Chinese tech stocks
summary: E-commerce and artificial intelligence stocks in China rise sharply driven by investor optimism.

title: Bank of America warns that the United States has two diverging economies
summary: The entity points to a growing gap between thriving sectors and those in difficulty within the US economy.

title: The IPO drought in London reaches critical levels, with takeovers surpassing fundraising
summary: The value of takeover offers in the UK exceeds that of new listings by 27 times, reflecting the drought of market debuts.

title: A retiree loses $300,000 in a gold coin scam and discovers an unexpected surcharge on IRMAA
summary: The woman was a victim of an investment fraud that also caused a surprising increase in her Medicare premiums.
